name: Exchange ProxyShell Pattern Detected
description: Detects URL patterns associated with ProxyShell exploitation attempts against Microsoft Exchange servers.

prompts.prompt: High-severity alert: Potential ProxyShell exploitation attempt detected against Microsoft Exchange server. Suspicious URL patterns observed in IIS logs. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Client IP** {c-ip}, **Client Method** {c-method}, **Client URI** {c-uri}, **Server Status Code** {sc-status}, **Client Username** {cs-username}, **Server Port** {s-port}. Immediately investigate this critical event for signs of compromise and apply necessary patches.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the IIS log entry.

parameters.name: c-ip
parameters.description: The client IP address making the request.

parameters.name: c-method
parameters.description: The HTTP method used by the client (e.g., GET, POST).

parameters.name: c-uri
parameters.description: The URI requested by the client, containing the suspicious ProxyShell patterns.

parameters.name: sc-status
parameters.description: The HTTP status code returned by the server.

parameters.name: cs-username
parameters.description: The username provided by the client, if any.

parameters.name: s-port
parameters.description: The server port that received the request.
